description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a rectangular footprint and a prominent front porch enclosed by blue-tinted glass or acrylic panels. The exterior walls are clad in dark gray siding, punctuated by evenly spaced white-framed windows. The house features a spacious open-plan living area, visible through large windows, and several smaller rooms likely serving as bedrooms and bathrooms. The front porch is elevated with white columns and railings, accessed by a short set of steps, and provides a welcoming entryway. The roof is flat, with no visible overhangs or complex architectural features, giving the house a modern, streamlined appearance. The window arrangement is regular and functional, contributing to a balanced and practical facade.
description: A modern, single-story house with dark gray siding, white-framed windows, and a blue-glass front porch. The flat roof and symmetrical window layout give it a clean, contemporary look.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the blue-glass porch, white columns, and main entry door, with several windows visible on the facade.
description_view_1: The rear view shows more windows and the back wall, with the porch and entryway less visible.
description_view_2: The side view displays the length of the house, multiple windows, and the flat roof, with the porch just visible at the far end.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the side and partial rear of the house, showing the porch from an angle and the regular window placement.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a blue-glass enclosed porch with white columns, steps, and a central door.
